subject: feat(icons): SVG source icon with Sharp pipeline, replace all placeholder PNGs
body:
Created brand icon: teal background, white fuel drop, "R" for Rand in
center circle. Simple design that reads well from 1024px down to 48px
favicon. SVG source at assets/icon-source.svg, Sharp script at
scripts/generate-icons.mjs generates all needed sizes.

Generated PNGs: icon.png (1024), adaptive-icon.png (1024),
splash-icon.png (1024), favicon.png (48), icon-192.png, icon-512.png.

Config updates:
- manifest.json: multi-size PWA icons (192, 512, 1024 maskable)
- app.json: splash + adaptive icon backgroundColor changed from white
  to brand teal (#0D9488)

Tags: icons, branding, sharp, build-tools
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branding
Semver: minor
